NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​Avalonia.​DownloadProgressWindow
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​Avalonia.​Controls.​BaseWindow
NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IDownloadProgress
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​Avalonia.​Interfaces.​IBackgroundColorChanger
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​Avalonia.​DownloadProgressWindow

Interaction logic for DownloadProgressWindow.xaml.  Window that shows while SparkleUpdater is downloading the update for the user.

Variables
_didCallDownloadProcessCompletedHandler
private bool _didCallDownloadProcessCompletedHandler
_dataContext
private DownloadProgressWindowViewModel? _dataContext
_actionButton
private Button? _actionButton
Functions
DownloadProgressWindow

Base constructor for DownloadProgressWindow. Initializes the window and sets up the Closing event.

public DownloadProgressWindow(
DownloadProgressWindowViewModel 
viewModel,
Bitmap? 
iconBitmap
)

Constructor for DownloadProgressWindow that takes an initialized DownloadProgressWindowViewModel view model for use

Parameters
viewModel
DownloadProgressWindowViewModel

DownloadProgressWindowViewModel view model that this window will bind to as its DataContext

iconBitmap
Bitmap?

Bitmap to use for the app's logo/graphic

Events
DownloadProcessCompleted
public event DownloadInstallEventHandler? DownloadProcessCompleted

Event to fire when the download UI is complete; tells you if the install process should happen or not
